hero.headline: 3.1 Million Contracts. One Question:
hero.sub: RUBLI tracks every Mexican federal procurement contract since 2002. Powered by ML risk scoring, network analysis, and 390 documented corruption cases.

how.title: From Raw Data to Investigation Leads
how.sub: Three steps. 16 ML features. 12 per-sector models.
how.step1_body: 23 years of COMPRANET procurement data -- 3.1 million contracts, 320K vendors, 12 sectors. Cleaned, classified, and normalized.
how.step2_body: ML risk scoring with 16 z-score features, per-sector logistic models, PU-learning correction. Train AUC 0.880, Test AUC 0.840.
how.step3_body: Ranked investigation queue with evidence, SHAP explanations, confidence intervals. Every score has a reason.

cta.title: Open-source. No account required.
cta.sub: Data from COMPRANET 2002-2025. Model v6.1. AUC 0.840.

footer.platform: RUBLI -- Mexican Government Procurement Analysis Platform
